name: EOS state: VMOC_UNAGREED — VMOC Modifications document missing (400 error expected)
description: VMOC_UNAGREED case where the VMOC Modifications document has not been uploaded. The backend must reject the request with a 400 error before calling Claude. This test validates the API-level guard in analyze_termination, not Claude's output.

rp_summary.note: Irrelevant — request should be rejected before reaching Claude

manual_testing_note: Submit to /analyze-termination with eos_state=VMOC_UNAGREED but no vmoc_modifications file. Expect HTTP 400 with JSON error: {'error': 'VMOC Modifications document required when EOS state is VMOC_UNAGREED.'} The request must be rejected by the Flask route guard, not by Claude.
notes: Backend guard location: app.py analyze_termination route, after eos_state extraction. Condition: eos_state == 'VMOC_UNAGREED' and not request.files.get('vmoc_modifications').
